scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const distPath=path.join(process.cwd(),'dist','server.js'); console.log('Checking:', distPath); console.log('Exists:', fs.existsSync(distPath)); console.log('CWD:', process.cwd()); console.log('Files in dist:', fs.existsSync('dist') ? fs.readdirSync('dist').join(', ') : 'dist folder not found');"
scripts.build:render: npm run db:generate && npm run build
scripts.prestart: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); console.log('CWD:', process.cwd()); const distPath=path.join(process.cwd(),'dist','server.js'); console.log('Looking for:', distPath); if (!fs.existsSync(distPath)) { console.error('ERROR: dist/server.js not found at', distPath); console.error('Files in current dir:', fs.readdirSync('.').join(', ')); if (fs.existsSync('dist')) { console.error('Files in dist:', fs.readdirSync('dist').join(', ')); } process.exit(1); }"
